title: Governador Valadares, MG — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Governador Valadares, MG: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Governador Valadares is a city in MG with a population of 281,046. A major city in eastern Minas Gerais along the Doce River, known for its gemstone trade and as a hub for Brazilian emigrants abroad.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
